SEARCH
Module com.example.progettosw
Package Network.Client.Socket

Class SocketClient

java.lang.Object
Network.Client.Socket.SocketClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClientToServerCommunication
public class SocketClient extends Object implements ClientToServerCommunication
This class is the implementation of the ClientToServerCommunication interface for the Socket connection
